title: CD-I Pokemon Tournament Part 4 Mario's Revenge
description:
Since I feel like the video is incomplete, I will upload a small bonus video that will show the 2 more minutes of this video.

The video will show what happend with Ganon and The Princess.

*SONG LIST*
(Fron the beginning to the end in order)

1: Tales of Eternia - Great Battle 2

2: Grandia 1 - Ancient Illusionary Castle

3: The Legend of Zelda Ocarina of Time - Hyrule Castle Courtyard

4: Final Fantasy IX  - RUN!

5: Super Mario World - The Evil King Bowser

6: SaGa Frontier 2 - Besessnheit 

7: Grandia 2  FIGHT!! Ver.3 ~ Middle Boss Battle

8: SaGa Frontier Victory theme

9: SaGa Frontier - Red's Last Battle (Easily in my top 5 of my favorite RPG battle theme) ;p

10: Mario and Luigi Bowser's Inside Story - BATTLE THEME

11: Skies of Arcadia Legend - Bombardment Victory

12: Forbidden Forest 3 (I don't know the name of the song, but it's when you complete your mission so I guess it's a victory theme)

*END OF THE SONG LIST*
